name: Druid
description: A nature caster who balances healing and elemental damage. Druids mend with cure and burn foes with moonfire, then train regrowth and stoneskin to sustain and armor themselves, and at level 15 learn thornlash to bind and rend a foe in barbed vines, then at level 30 bear form, a shapeshift that swells them into a great bear for hard-hitting, thick-hided melee, and at level 45 wild growth, a group heal-over-time that blooms verdant life across the whole party's wounds, then at level 60 hurricane, the druid's first area attack: a howling storm of nature's fury that batters and blinds every foe in the room, and at level 75 entangling roots, the druid's first AoE control: a spread of grasping vines that erupts from the earth and roots every foe in the room in place.
